titleStmt.title: SII 9.169: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 169. (A.R. No. 214 of 1918.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE MALLIKARJUNA TEMPLE AT KURUVATTI, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 29, Tāraṇa, Vaiśākha, śu. 3, Ādityavāra. The details given correspond to A.D. 1104 March 30 Wednesday, not Sunday, as stated. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva and states that the Mahājanas of the agrahāra of Gaṇḍarādityanahoḻal having complained to the eMperor that the Manneya Boppaya, who had captured Hoḷalu, was plundering the village and killing even the Brāhmans, the emperor sent for him, chastised him and took from him an undertaking that he and his descendants would not have a claim to the Manneya of Hoḷalu. Boppaya did so in the presence of the people of the thirtytwothousand province containing Beṇṇevūru twelve, Nīrugunda, the two Haḍaṅgiles, Māṅgōḷa, Bidirahaḷḷi, Hahanūru, Honnavaḷḷi, Kuṟuvatti and Bāḷguḷi; and after drinking water at the temple of Tripurāntakadēva, he set up this stone.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
jayatyāviṣkritaṁ viṣṇōrvārāhaṁ kṣōbhitārṇnavaṁ .
dakṣiṇōnnatadaṁṣṭrāgraviśrāntabhuvanaṁ vapuḥ .
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trai
ḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūḷastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ
mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭāra
kaṁ satyāśrayakuḻatikaṁ cāḻukyābharaṇaṁ
śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamu
ttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ
baraṁ saluttaṁ rājadhāni kalyāṇapurada nelevīḍino
ḻu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire
cāḻukyavikramavarṣada 29 neya tāraṇasaṁ
vatsarada vaiśākha śuddhatadige Ādityavāradaṁdu A
grāhāraṁ gaṁḍarādityanahoḻala mahājanaṁgaḻu
maṁneyaṁ boppayaṁ hoḷalaniṟidu sarvasvaha
raṇaṁ māḍi sūregoṁḍudumaṁ brāhmaṇaraṁ
kondudumaṁ cakravarttige binnapaṁgeyyalu
kēḻdavadhārisi boppanaṁ daṁḍisi samasta pra
dhānara saṁnidhānadalu Ā Agrahārakke maṁneya
rāruvilladantāgi niyāmisi kuḍivendu prādhāna
rggaṁ śrīmanumaleyāḻapaṁḍitadēvarggaṁ sōmēśvarabha
ṭṭayaṁgaḻigaṁ cakravartti besasalanibaruviḻdu
boppanaṁ karedu nīnuṁ ninnavaṁśadavaruṁ hoḻala ma(ṁ)
nneyama māṇbudendu māṇisalātanuvantege
yvanendu Āṇepatramaṁ koṭṭu tripurāṁtaka
dēvara baḷi nīraṁ kuḍidīpaḍiyal śāsana
maṁ kuṁduvantāgiyoḍaṁbaṭṭu baṁdanā kramadale
maleyāḻapaṁḍitadēvaruṁ tānuviḻdu manne
yamaṁ biṭṭu beṁṇevūru hanneraḍaṟa prabhugāvu
ṇḍagaḷa nīraguṁdada Eraḍuṁ haḍaṁgileya māṁ
goḻada bidirahaḷḷiya hahanūra hoṁnavattiya
kuṟuvattiya bāḷguḻiyantu mūva
ttircchāsirada sannidhānadalu traiḷōkyamallēśvaradēva
ra munteyuṁ hoḻalaluṁ śāsanamaṁ nilisida
niṁtī dharmmamantappade pratipāḷisuvaru Ī dharmma
manārorbbaru pratipāḷisidavarige kurukṣē
tra vāraṇāsiyalu sūryyagraha
ṇadalu sāsira vēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇa
rgge sāsira kavileya kōḍuṁ koḻagumaṁ hoṁ
nalu kaṭṭisi dakṣiṇeverasi koṭṭa puṇya
vakkuvī dharmmamanaḷidavanī pēḻda sthānaṁ
gaḻalu sāsira kavileyuṁ brāhma
ṇarumanaḷida mahāpātakanakku . sāmā
nyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pāla
nīyō bhavadbhiḥ . sarvvānētān bhāginaḥ pā
rtthivēṁdrān bhūyō bhūyō yāca
tē rāmabhadraḥ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā
yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭhirvarṣasaha
srāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 9.169 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
